Appearances:
Plaintiff John Muhawieh is present.
Attorney Samer Danfoura appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cynthia E. Zeidan is present. Ming Tang is NOT present.
Attorney Josh Schieber representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem William Rauch, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-30-2012 remains on calendar.
